items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO details deploying OpenAI's Codex across all engineering teams to pioneer AI-native software development, boosting productivity in Asia's fast-growing tech ecosystem.
items.why_it_matters: Real-world adoption by Sea Limited, parent of Shopee with massive engineering scale, validates Codex for production agentic coding. Signals shift from human-led to AI-orchestrated dev workflows, inspiring enterprises to integrate coding agents for faster iteration, reduced bugs, and Asia-focused innovation.
items.suggested_reel_angle: Tech giant Sea deploys OpenAI Codex to EVERY engineer - revolutionizing AI-native coding in Asia!
suggested_long_angle: Sea's engineering challenges and Codex solution
Future of agentic dev for global teams

items.title: Work with Codex from Anywhere
items.summary: OpenAI integrates Codex into the ChatGPT mobile app, enabling real-time monitoring, steering, and approval of coding tasks across devices and remote setups.
items.why_it_matters: Breaks desktop barriers for agentic coding, allowing devs to manage AI agents on-the-go. Enhances remote work, accelerates debugging/iteration, and scales Codex to mobile-first teams, pushing agentic tools mainstream.
items.suggested_reel_angle: Codex goes mobile! Code, monitor, approve AI tasks from your phone with ChatGPT.
suggested_long_angle: Use cases for remote dev teams

items.title: GraphBit: A Graph-based Agentic Framework for Non-Linear Agent Orchestration
items.summary: GraphBit introduces DAG-orchestrated workflows for LLM agents, eliminating hallucinated routing, infinite loops, and non-reproducible runs via explicit, deterministic graph definitions.
items.why_it_matters: Solves core reliability issues in prompted agent systems, enabling production-grade multi-agent apps. Builders gain structured orchestration for complex tasks, outperforming linear chains; aligns with trends in langgraph/autogen.
items.suggested_reel_angle: Ditch agent loops forever! GraphBit's DAG magic for bulletproof LLM orchestration.

items.title: A Two-Dimensional Framework for AI Agent Design Patterns: Cognitive Function and Execution Topology
items.summary: New 2D framework classifies LLM agent architectures by cognitive functions (what they do) and execution topology (data flow), bridging industry tools and cognitive science.
items.why_it_matters: Provides clarity for designing distinct agent systems, avoiding one-size-fits-all pitfalls. Helps practitioners select patterns from Anthropic/LangChain etc., accelerating robust multi-agent builds.
items.suggested_reel_angle: Unlock agent design mastery with this 2D framework - cognitive + topology!

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context, Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.summary: IBM releases Granite Embedding Multilingual R2, Apache 2.0 open model with top retrieval performance under 100M params, supporting 32K context for diverse languages.
items.why_it_matters: Efficient open alternative crushes proprietary embeddings in multilingual RAG/search at low cost. Enables scalable, local-first apps for global data, vital for production vector search without vendor lock-in.
items.suggested_reel_angle: Best tiny multilingual embeddings! IBM Granite R2 dominates retrieval under 100M params.
